Definition (EN): An enumeration definition is a kind of attribute definition (see 7.7 ) whose instances are limited to specific set of enumerated values.
Context/Example (EN): An enumeration definition is a kind of attribute definition (see 7.7 ) whose instances are limited to specific set of enumerated values.

Definition (EN): An enumeration usage is an attribute usage that is required to have a single definition that is an enumeration definition.
Context/Example (EN): An enumeration usage is an attribute usage that is required to have a single definition that is an enumeration definition.

Definition (EN): The instances of an enumeration definition are limited to a specific set of enumerated values.
Context/Example (EN): An enumeration definition may not contain anything other than the declaration of its enumerated values.

Equivalent (JP): バリエーション（列挙定義の）
Definition (EN): An enumeration definition is always considered to be a variation.
Context/Example (EN): An enumeration definition is always considered to be a variation and its enumerated values are its variants.

Equivalent (JP): バリアント（列挙定義の）
Definition (EN): The enumerated values of an enumeration definition are its variants.
Context/Example (EN): An enumeration definition is always considered to be a variation and its enumerated values are its variants.

Definition (EN): The keyword used to declare an enumeration definition or an enumeration usage.
Context/Example (EN): An enumeration definition is declared as described in 7.6.2 , using the kind keyword enum, with the additional restrictions described below. An enumeration usage is declared as described in 7.6.3 , using the kind keyword enum.

Definition (EN): An enumeration usage declared as an enumerated value is considered to be implicitly defined by its owning enumeration definition and, therefore, may not have any explicitly declared definition other than that enumeration definition (and need not have any explicitly declared definition at all).
Context/Example (EN): Since the body of an enumeration definition may only declare enumeration usages, the declaration of an enumerated value may omit the enum keyword.
